title: Aao Aao Ganjanan
lyrics:
Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Bhole Shankar Ke Putr Gajanan,
Gaura Maiya Ke Putr Gajanan,
Aake Bhakton Ke Man Ko Bhao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Riddhi Siddhi Ko Sang Mein Laana,
Gaura Maiya Ko Bhool Na Jaana,
Aane Mein Der Na Lagao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Hum Sabke Pyare Gajanan,
Sab Devon Se Nyare Gajanan,
Aake Kirtan Mein Ras Barsao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhao

Aao Aao Gajanan Aao,
Aake Bhakton Ka Maan Badhaon
